data.name: Universe in Cum 2 💦 🌎
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the captivating world of Universe in Cum 2 💦 🌎! Imagine yourself in an adult visual novel game where you are transported to a mysterious planet filled with incredible surprises. The main heroine immerses herself in the boundless allure of this world, where the locals explore new forms of pleasure and discover uncharted sexual dimensions.

On this planet, the scent of humans becomes a tantalizing hue that bewilders the inhabitants, making them lose their minds in their desire to fulfill all their cravings. Embark on an exhilarating quest where thrilling adventures, unforgettable romantic connections, and intriguing plot twists come to life in your gaming experience.

Universe in Cum 2 offers you not only a fantastic story and enchanting graphics but also experimental adult content that unlocks new possibilities to satisfy your sexual fantasies. Immerse yourself in daring erotic scenes and intimate moments that help you explore your own world of pleasure.

Indulge in encounters with incredibly attractive characters, each with their unique traits and secrets. Choose your own path, navigate complex situations, and perhaps even find true love amidst this wondrous cosmic chaos.

Immerse yourself in the world of Universe in Cum 2 💦 🌎 and conquer uncharted horizons of pleasure, where your fantasies and desires become reality. This game carries the magic to open up new facets of enjoyment and show you the beauty of combining adventure and sexuality.

Get ready for an unforgettable adventurous journey that allows you to unleash your sexual imagination in the realm of Universe in Cum 2!

Features:
  • Plenty of lewd scenes with various characters
  • Real-time 3D character and animations
  • A fascinating story
  • A Multitude of Sexy Situations
  • Ability to play with one hand. ( ͡~ ͜ʖ ͡°)

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
